subject: CTF range & Fourier in Overview tab
body:
Hi Dimitry

I got 2 questions:

1.In your Quick Start guide CTF fitting options section about the Range, it 
mentioned 'It is usually best to ignore the lowest frequencies.´, can you 
explain this more? I thought it is more the highest frequencies need to be 
ignored to avoid overfitting.

2. In the Fourier Overview (see attachment), when I put the mouse to wach 
individual CTF peak, other than A, there's also a value of 3-4 digits 
given, what's does it mean?  

Many thanks in advance!

Best wishes
Joanne
